---
title: "Hello"
description: "First post on Asankhya — what this space is for."
author: "Soma S Dhavala"
date: "2026-05-18"
categories: [meta]
---

This is **Asankhya** — a quieter space for personal writing.
Distinct from [SaddlePoint](../../saddlepoint/), which is for
academic and technical work.

Expect essays, notes from books, observations, and slower thinking.

*(More to come.)*
